description: The village square of Grimhold. A weathered fountain stands at the center, long since dry. Market stalls line the edges, though most have seen better days.

items.name: Faded Notice
items.description: A faded notice pinned to the fountain. It reads: 'WANTED: Brave souls to seek the lost Brewmaster's Vault. Reward: Eternal glory and all the ale you can drink.' Someone has scrawled 'GOOD LUCK' across the bottom in red ink.

items.name: Loose Cobblestone
items.description: One of the cobblestones is loose. It wobbles when you step on it. There might be something underneath, but you'd need considerable strength to pry it up.

items.name: Dried Herbs
items.description: A bundle of dried herbs hanging from an abandoned market stall. They smell faintly of rosemary and something magical. A druid would know more.

exits.description: The door to The Rusty Tankard tavern.
